signals.headline: $175M DeFi Exploit on Kelp DAO Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
$175M DeFi Exploit on Kelp DAO Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On April 22, 2026, a hacker stole and began laundering $175M in ETH from Kelp DAO, triggering a crisis in Ethereum's restaking ecosystem and raising security concerns.[3]  
Short-term bearish for DeFi trust, potentially moving markets on exploit resolutions or ecosystem impacts.[3]
